phrases.intent_en: Where is Parsennbahnen Talstation ticket office
phrases.text_local: Wo ist die Kasse der Parsennbahnen Talstation?
phrases.cultural_note: In Swiss ski resorts, ticket offices are typically centrally located in the main building of the base station, often near the entrance or main lobby.

likely_response.translation_en: In the main building of the base station.

responses.english: In the main building of the base station.

phrases.intent_en: Can I buy gondola upgrade at mid-station
phrases.text_local: Kann ich an der Mittelstation ein Gondel-Upgrade kaufen?
phrases.cultural_note: In Swiss ski resorts, gondola or lift upgrades are typically only available for purchase at the base station ticket offices, not at mid-stations.

likely_response.translation_en: No, only at the base station.

responses.english: No, only at the base station.

phrases.intent_en: Where does Schatzalp funicular leave from
phrases.cultural_note: In Davos, the Schatzalp funicular departs from a clearly marked valley station near the Parsennbahnen area, accessible via signposted routes.

likely_response.translation_en: Down to the left, next to the ticket counter.

responses.english: Down to the left, next to the ticket counter.

phrases.intent_en: How to get deposit back from ski rental
phrases.text_local: Wie bekomme ich meine Kaution vom Ski-Verleih zurück?
phrases.cultural_note: In Swiss ski resorts, ski rental deposits are typically returned upon returning the equipment with the receipt provided at rental.

likely_response.local: Reichen Sie den Bon am Schalter ein.
likely_response.translation_en: Submit the receipt at the counter.

responses.english: Submit the receipt at the counter.
responses.local: Reichen Sie den Bon am Schalter ein.
